description: Legal document in Judaeo-Arabic. Dating: 15[..] Seleucid = 1188–1288, and also [..]44 or [..]74 AM. The potential matches are 4974 AM = 1213/14 CE and 5044 AM = 1283/84 CE. Of these two options, 1213/14 CE is more likely. The document involves Bunayn/Banīn from Alexandria.
description_he: מסמך משפטי ביהודית-ערבית מהמאה ה-13. מוחזק בבית המדרש לרבנים.
